task_completion.description: Create the item layout file item_onboarding.xml with an ImageView and two TextViews.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Android Studio editor with 'item_onboarding.xml' open, containing an <ImageView> and two <TextView> elements (for title and description).

task_completion.description: Update activity_main.xml to include ViewPager2 and TabLayout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing 'activity_main.xml' open in the editor, containing <androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2> and <com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout>.
Screenshot showing 'OnboardingAdapter.kt' (or .java) open in the editor with a class named 'OnboardingAdapter' extending a RecyclerView Adapter.

task_completion.description: Bind the specific page data in the adapter using provided resources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the adapter code showing references to the drawable resources (e.g., R.drawable.ic_explore, ic_plan) and string resources (e.g., 'Explore the World', 'Plan Your Trip', 'Share Memories').

task_completion.description: Set up the ViewPager2 and TabLayout in MainActivity using TabLayoutMediator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of MainActivity code showing the setup of ViewPager2, setting its adapter to OnboardingAdapter, and the use of TabLayoutMediator to connect the TabLayout with the ViewPager2.

task_completion.description: The onboarding carousel is successfully rendered in the app or layout preview.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Android emulator or Android Studio layout preview displaying the onboarding UI, which includes an image, a title (e.g., 'Explore the World'), a description, and a set of tab indicators.

integrity.description: The agent used Android Studio to write the code and interact with the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Android Studio IDE being used to edit files, rather than just terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat'.

integrity.description: The code is written in the correct files within the project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The editor tabs or file tree in Android Studio show the correct file names (item_onboarding.xml, activity_main.xml, OnboardingAdapter.kt, MainActivity.kt) in the TravelBuddy project.

integrity.description: The visual output of the app is shown in a genuine environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The app UI is visible within the Android Studio layout preview pane or a running Android emulator, not as a standalone image opened in an image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TravelBuddy.
